---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Universitat de Barcelona

**Introduction to Stata and Matlab** (MSc in Economics)  
  Co-instructor with Prof. Rafael Serrano-Quintero  
  *Fall 2023, 2024, 2025 (12 hours)*  
  [Course materials](https://github.com/salvatoreviola/intro-to-stata)

**Econometrics** (BS in International Business)  
  Teaching Assistant of Prof. Antonio Di Paolo  
  *Spring 2024, 2025 (14 hours)*

**Spatial Econometrics** (MSc in Economics)  
  Teaching Assistant of Prof. Rosina Moreno  
  *Spring 2024 (6 hours)*
